_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-13 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 2/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1408.2 is above EMA18 (1378.71) and EMA50 (1338.75) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (26.67) is below its signal line (28.22) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1391.13) and resistance (1409.73) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -1.31%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. ITC.name: ITC
ITC.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads).
